allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: xKMU Business OS

- Multi-tenant CRM with Next.js 15, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM
- Modules: Companies, Persons, Leads, Ideas \(AI Lab\), Products
- AI Integration: Gemini/OpenAI/Ollama for lead research, outreach
- Features: Webhooks, Activity Timeline, Document Analysis
- Docker Compose setup for development

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git tag -a v0.1.0 -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v0.1.0 - Initial Release

First public release of xKMU Business OS.

Features:
- CRM Module \(Companies, Persons, Leads\)
- AI Lab with idea processing
- AI Integration \(Gemini, OpenAI, Ollama\)
- Activity Timeline
- Webhook Support
- Multi-Tenant architecture
- Email Integration

Deployment: Vercel, Coolify, Docker
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Daten\\xKMU-BusinessOS" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add SQL database import with API key auth for export/import

- Add POST /api/v1/import/database endpoint with merge and replace modes
- Add import UI page at /intern/settings/import with file upload and mode selection
- Add API key authentication to both export and import routes \(previously session-only\)
- Add documents and document_items tables to export
- Add Backup tab to API documentation with curl examples
- Export requires read permission, import requires write permission

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
